'''dayogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oomiak|oomiak]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oomiak|oomiak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dayogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæyegeth|dæyegeth]] || [[word:dæyegej|dæyegej]] || [[word:dæyegesh|dæyegesh]] || [[word:dæyege|dæyege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dayoyogoth|dayoyogoth]] || [[word:dayoyogoj|dayoyogoj]] || [[word:dayoyogosh|dayoyogosh]] || [[word:dayoyogo|dayoyogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dayogoth|dayogoth]] || [[word:dayogoj|dayogoj]] || [[word:dayogosh|dayogosh]] || [[word:dayogo|dayogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dayofgoth|dayofgoth]] || [[word:dayofgoj|dayofgoj]] || [[word:dayofgosh|dayofgosh]] || [[word:dayofgof|dayofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dayogotho|dayogotho]] || [[word:dayogojo|dayogojo]] || [[word:dayogosho|dayogosho]] || [[word:dayogoko|dayogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dayogoth|dayogoth]] || [[word:dayogoj|dayogoj]] || [[word:dayogosh|dayogosh]] || [[word:dayogo|dayogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dayogothol|dayogothol]] || [[word:dayogojol|dayogojol]] || [[word:dayogoshol|dayogoshol]] || [[word:dayogokol|dayogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dayogothotho|dayogothotho]] || [[word:dayogojojo|dayogojojo]] || [[word:dayogoshosho|dayogoshosho]] || [[word:dayogoko|dayogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dayogothon|dayogothon]] || [[word:dayogojon|dayogojon]] || [[word:dayogoshon|dayogoshon]] || [[word:dayogokon|dayogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dayogothoro|dayogothoro]] || [[word:dayogojoro|dayogojoro]] || [[word:dayogoshoro|dayogoshoro]] || [[word:dayogokoro|dayogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
